'''pazïfwïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycovirus|mycovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycovirus|mycovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| pazïfwïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pæzïfwïfth || pæzïfwïfj || pæzïfwïfsh || pæzïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pazïfzïfwïfth || pazïfzïfwïfj || pazïfzïfwïfsh || pazïfzïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pazïfwïfth || pazïfwïfj || pazïfwïfsh || pazïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pazïffwïffth || pazïffwïffj || pazïffwïffsh || pazïffwïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || pazïfwïfïf || pazïfwïfïf || pazïfwïfïf || pazïfwïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || pazïfwïfth || pazïfwïfj || pazïfwïfsh || pazïfwïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || pazïfwïfïfl || pazïfwïfïfl || pazïfwïfïfl || pazïfwïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || pazïfwïfïfïf || pazïfwïfïfïf || pazïfwïfïfïf || pazïfwïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || pazïfwïfïfn || pazïfwïfïfn || pazïfwïfïfn || pazïfwïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || pazïfwïfïforo || pazïfwïfïforo || pazïfwïfïforo || pazïfwïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
